title: Glowstone Lamp
description: Transforms Glowstone into a more versitile building block!
body:
![Textures of the Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a30c0902191d5b0903692660cfe0d94a3ee9f42.png)

Transform your Minecraft world with a soft industrial twist! This resource pack reimagines the vanilla glowstone block as a _Glowstone Lamp_ , giving it a sleek, lamp-like design perfect for building. The glowstone dust is also updated to become _Glowstone Lamp Shards_, reflecting the new theme with a polished, shard-like appearance.


<details>
<summary>✨ Features</summary>
 
- **Glowstone block** → Glowstone Lamp (new texture and item name)
 
- **Glowstone dust** → Glowstone Lamp Shards (new item texture and item name)
 
- Seamless integration with vanilla aesthetics
 
- Easier to Build With!

</details>

**Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.5+!** (will be updated accordingly).
No other blocks or items are changed — lightweight, simple and focused!
